$description: Gzip budgets for the production bundle (PRD §5: cold app-shell load < 2.5s on mid-tier hardware; TESTING.md performance checks). Measured as the INITIAL payload (entry + static-import closure via the Vite manifest); route chunks lazy-load and are unbudgeted. Raising a budget is a reviewed decision, not a drive-by.
